overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sandy beach with a large roller coaster and futuristic city skyline in the background. The character approaches a lifeguard tower, interacts with NPCs on the deck, and continues along the shoreline past graffiti-covered walls and beachgoers using a metal detector.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach toward the lifeguard tower

notable_agents.action: cyclist riding along the beach path in the distance

large steel roller coaster structure extending over the water
tall modern buildings with glass facades and digital billboards
scattered palm trees along the beachfront

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny beach with the camera walking toward a lifeguard tower. In the background, a massive roller coaster structure extends over the ocean while futuristic skyscrapers rise on the left. The beach is sparsely populated with a cyclist visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: lifeguard tower deck with arcade machine

arrives at the covered wooden deck area with ocean views

agents.ego_description: standing on the deck observing the NPCs and looking out at the ocean view

notable_agents.action: seated in plastic chair relaxing against the wall
standing by arcade machine looking out at the beach

entered.detail: sloped wooden walkway with railings leading up to the deck
colorful arcade game cabinet on the deck
white plastic chair on the wooden deck
wooden safety railing along the deck edge overlooking the beach
open view of the ocean and distant shoreline visible from the deck

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wooden ramp to the lifeguard tower deck, transitioning from open beach to a semi-covered wooden platform. Two NPCs are present—one seated in a plastic chair and another standing by an arcade machine. The deck offers a sheltered view of the ocean and roller coaster in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach area with graffiti-covered concrete walls

events.description: exits the covered deck back onto the open beach
descends the wooden ramp returning to sand level

agents.ego_description: walking along the beach past colorful graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
multiple concrete structures with vibrant graffiti on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the lifeguard tower deck, the camera descends back to the beach and walks through an area with graffiti-covered concrete walls on both sides. The roller coaster remains visible to the right as the camera moves through this more enclosed section of the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach with two women using metal detector

events.description: approaches two women scanning the beach with a metal detector device

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the two women searching the beach with equipment

notable_agents.action: woman operating a metal detector scanning the sand for objects
woman standing nearby observing the metal detector operation

entered.detail: handheld metal detector device being used to scan the sand

segments.scene_description: The camera walks toward two women on the beach, one actively using a metal detector to scan the sand while the other observes. The graffiti walls fall behind as the camera moves closer to the shoreline, with the ocean visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline approaching roller coaster pier

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline toward the roller coaster structure

entered.detail: rusted metal barrel sitting on the sand
calm ocean water along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the shoreline, the camera moves past the two women and approaches the large roller coaster structure extending over the water. A rusted barrel sits on the sand in the foreground as the camera walks toward the pier structure, with the ocean visible along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a sunny beach that transitions from an open shoreline to a sheltered outpost and back into the coastal landscape. It begins by walking toward a lifeguard tower under a skyline of futuristic skyscrapers and a massive roller coaster extending over the ocean. As the camera ascends a wooden ramp, the view shifts from the wide beach to a semi-covered deck where NPCs lounge near an arcade machine. The scene then moves back down to the sand, passing through a narrow corridor of graffiti-covered concrete walls before opening up again toward two women using a metal detector. Finally, the camera continues along the shoreline past a rusted barrel, drawing closer to the towering pier structure and the adjacent ocean.
